alternatives.justification: 4 alts (scaling, coloidal, KMnO4 Mn precipitation) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: Restaurar DBNPA cada 3d + CIP alcalino pH 11-12 + SDS — completo, no oxidante.

requested_data.justification: Pide microbial ID (Pseudomonas, Bacillus) — match accepted (microbio en concentrado).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: ATP <100 + ΔP <1.0 por 7d → biofouling resuelto.
